title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.4.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | minor | `1.2.3` -> `1.4.0` | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.4.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​140)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.3.3...v1.4.0)

_2019-03-01_

##### Features

-   Add option to change the name of the dynamic import function to allow polyfilling it ([#​2723](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2723))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2723](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2723): Add dynamicImportFunction option ([@​keithamus](https://togithub.com/keithamus))

### [`v1.3.3`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​133)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.3.2...v1.3.3)

_2019-03-01_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Fix performance regression when handling long chains of calls to property methods ([#​2732](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2732))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2730](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2730): Order types, interfaces, classes, and object members ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2732](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2732): Take chunk export mode into account when reexporting default ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.3.2`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​132)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.3.1...v1.3.2)

_2019-02-27_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Allow ids of default exported classes to be exported separately ([#​2728](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2728))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2728](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2728): Update dependencies ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.3.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​131)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1)

_2019-02-27_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Correctly reexport the default export from entry chunks ([#​2727](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2727))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2727](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2727): Take chunk export mode into account when reexporting default ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.3.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​130)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.2.5...v1.3.0)

_2019-02-26_

##### Features

-   Treeshake call expressions prefixed with UglifyJS style `@__PURE__` annotations ([#​2429](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2429))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2429](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2429): Add support for /_#**PURE**_/ comments ([@​conartist6](https://togithub.com/conartist6) and [@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.2.5`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​125)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.2.4...v1.2.5)

_2019-02-26_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Store external ids reported by plugins in watch mode ([#​2718](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2718))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2718](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2718): Incremental external ([@​andreas-karlsson](https://togithub.com/andreas-karlsson))

### [`v1.2.4`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​124)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.2.3...v1.2.4)

_2019-02-26_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Fix an issue where a variable was imported twice under the same name ([#​2715](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2715))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2715](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2715): Deduplicate imports referencing default exports and their original variables ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

</details>
